Communication.excerpt: "Wait a minute, did he just make a joke about his death?" Kimmel said.

Communication.title: Australia to require Google, Meta, TikTok to pay for local news — or face new tax
Communication.excerpt: Dubbed the “News Bargaining Incentive,” the proposed law would impose a 2.25% tax on the local revenues of the social media giants that are unable or unwilling to reach deals with news outlets.

Communication.title: Disney makes major decision on the future of ESPN
Communication.excerpt: Sources told Business Insider that CEO Josh D'Amaro has opted, for now, to retain ESPN inside Disney rather than turn it into a standalone company.
